example.es: Necesito revisar la tarea antes de entregarla.
example.en: I need to review the homework before submitting it.
example.vi: Tôi cần xem lại bài tập trước khi nộp.

definitions.en: To review or look over something again.
definitions.vi: Xem xét hoặc nhìn lại một cái gì đó.
definitions.es: Revisar o mirar algo de nuevo.

notes_md:
**xem lại** = to review, look at something again to check or refresh your memory. It’s used when you want to re-check details or rethink something.

It often goes with things like video, email, kế hoạch (plans), hoặc vấn đề. It can also mean reconsider, not just physically look again.


Close words: **kiểm tra lại** (more formal, focus on checking for mistakes), **ôn lại** (review for study).
exampleSentences: Em cần xem lại bài tập trước khi nộp cho giáo viên.
Anh muốn xem lại hợp đồng trước khi ký tên.
Chị thường xem lại các ghi chú sau mỗi buổi học.

translation.en: I need to review the test.
I need to review the test.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I need to review the homework before submitting it to the teacher.
I want to review the contract before signing.
She usually reviews her notes after every class.
notes:
xem lại = to review, look at something again to check or refresh your memory. It’s used when you want to re-check details or rethink something.

It often goes with things like video, email, kế hoạch (plans), hoặc vấn đề. It can also mean reconsider, not just physically look again.

Close words: kiểm tra lại (more formal, focus on checking for mistakes), ôn lại (review for study).
